columns.name: season
columns.comment: Indicates the NFL season for which the roster data is applicable, typically used for sorting and filtering by year.

columns.name: team
columns.comment: Represents the name of the NFL team associated with the player, which helps in identifying team affiliations.

columns.name: position
columns.comment: Specifies the player's position on the football field, providing insight into their role within the team.

columns.name: depth_chart_position
columns.comment: Describes the player's ranking on the team's depth chart, indicating their level of playtime or importance.

columns.name: jersey_number
columns.comment: The number worn by the player during games, which is unique to each player on the same team.

columns.name: status
columns.comment: Reflects the current status of the player, such as active, injured, or retired, which is crucial for team management.

columns.name: full_name
columns.comment: The complete name of the player, typically used for official records and game rosters.

columns.name: first_name
columns.comment: The player's first name, useful for informal references and identifying players personally.

columns.name: last_name
columns.comment: The player's last name, which is essential for official identification and record-keeping.

columns.name: birth_date
columns.comment: The date of birth of the player, important for age-related analyses and tracking player careers.

columns.name: height
columns.comment: The player's height, measured in inches, which can be relevant for performance metrics and scouting reports.

columns.name: weight
columns.comment: The player's weight in pounds, an important physical statistic impacting performance evaluation.

columns.name: college
columns.comment: Indicates the college the player attended, useful for understanding their background and scouting history.

columns.name: gsis_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier assigned by the NFL's Game Statistics and Information System, helping in data tracking.

columns.name: espn_id
columns.comment: An identification number used by ESPN to reference the player, facilitating data linking between sources.

columns.name: sportradar_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for the player in the Sportradar system, useful for data integration and analytics.

columns.name: yahoo_id
columns.comment: The identification number used by Yahoo sports for the player, enhancing data management across platforms.

columns.name: rotowire_id
columns.comment: An ID assigned by Rotowire for tracking player information, making it easier to consolidate stats from multiple sources.

columns.name: pff_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier by Pro Football Focus, valuable for performance analytics and evaluations.

columns.name: pfr_id
columns.comment: The Football Reference unique identifier for each player, essential for linking player historical data.

columns.name: fantasy_data_id
columns.comment: An ID used in fantasy sports data systems, allowing for easier integration with fantasy player statistics.

columns.name: sleeper_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for the player within the Sleeper fantasy platform, aiding in fantasy management.

columns.name: years_exp
columns.comment: Represents the number of years the player has been active in the NFL, useful for understanding experience level.

columns.name: headshot_url
columns.comment: A URL linking to the player's headshot, useful for visual representations in rosters and media.

columns.name: ngs_position
columns.comment: The position defined by the Next Gen Stats system, providing additional context to traditional position designations.

columns.name: week
columns.comment: Denotes the specific week of the NFL season the data corresponds to, important for tracking player performance over time.

columns.name: game_type
columns.comment: Identifies the type of game (e.g., regular season, playoffs) the player is involved in, which is vital for analysis.

columns.name: status_description_abbr
columns.comment: A brief abbreviation describing the player's current status, useful for quick references.

columns.name: football_name
columns.comment: The name used in football contexts, often reflecting the player's identity in promotional materials.

columns.name: esb_id
columns.comment: An identification number used in the ESPN broadcast system, aiding in data connections across different platforms.

columns.name: gsis_it_id
columns.comment: An internal ID related to the player's entry in the NFL's Game Statistics and Information System.

columns.name: smart_id
columns.comment: A unique identifier for the player within the system, facilitating easy access to their specific data.

columns.name: entry_year
columns.comment: The year the player entered the NFL, important for historical context and career tracking.

columns.name: rookie_year
columns.comment: The year the player debuted in the NFL as a rookie, essential for evaluating player development and progress.

columns.name: draft_club
columns.comment: The team that drafted the player, providing insight into their career beginnings and team transitions.

columns.name: draft_number
columns.comment: Indicates the player's draft position number, useful for assessing their perceived potential at the time of drafting.

columns.name: ingested_at
columns.comment: The timestamp signifying when the data was recorded, important for data management and integrity checks.

columns.name: _source_file
columns.comment: References the original source file from which the data was ingested, aiding in tracking data provenance.
